name: Pre-existing condition flared up from job accident - covered?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing condition flared up from job accident - covered?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes if employment substantially caused or aggravated it in Utah.[4] Key factors: (1) Causal nexus proof; (2) Usual exertion suffices; (3) Medical differentiation; (4) No 'but for' full cause needed. Doctor report essential. Attorney fights denials.
